common.metaDescription: Multi-platform freelancer career tool — enter your profile once, optimize it for every platform.

hero.title: Manage your freelance career <hl>from one platform</hl>.
hero.subtitle: Enter your profile once. Optimize it with AI for LinkedIn, Upwork, Fiverr, Bionluk and Armut; publish your portfolio in seconds.

features.title: Everything in one place.
features.subtitle: All the tools you need as a freelancer, connected and automated.

adapt.title: Platform adaptation
adapt.desc: Enter your experience once. AI rewrites it into a tailored profile for LinkedIn, Upwork, Fiverr, Bionluk and Armut — each in that platform's voice.

portfolio.title: Portfolio site
portfolio.desc: Publish a polished portfolio page from your profile in seconds — shareable link, no code, no design work.

matching.title: Job matching
matching.desc: Paste a job post and get a 0–100 fit score with strengths, gaps and the requirements it extracted — so you only spend effort where you can win.

tracking.title: Application tracking
tracking.desc: Track every application through a clear pipeline: saved, applied, awaiting reply, interview, offer, rejected.

ai.title: AI generation
ai.desc: Generate platform-specific proposals covering the post's requirements, then patch any gaps with one click.

secure.title: Secure & fast
secure.desc: Row-level security, sanitized output and server-only AI keys. Your data is yours.

step1.title: Enter your profile once
step1.desc: Add your work, skills and results a single time — no per-platform copy-paste.

step2.title: AI adapts & builds
step2.desc: Get optimized text for all five platforms plus a ready-to-share portfolio site.

step3.title: Match, pitch & track
step3.desc: Score job posts, generate proposals that fit, and track every application in one place.

pricing.title: Pay only for what you use
pricing.subtitle: Credit-based, pay-as-you-go. No subscription, no auto-renew traps. Start with 100 free credits.

desc.starter: Great for trying things out — a month of active adapting, matching and proposals.
desc.pro: For active freelancers applying every week. Best value per credit.
desc.scale: For power users and small agencies running at volume.

q.beta: Is it really free to start?

a.credits: Credits are what you spend on AI actions. Adapting a profile or matching a job costs 1 credit, a proposal 2, a full portfolio 3. You always see your balance before you spend.
a.expire: No. Credits never expire — buy once, use whenever. There's no monthly reset.
a.subscription: No subscription and no auto-renew. It's pay-as-you-go: top up credits only when you want to.
a.platforms: LinkedIn, Upwork, Fiverr, Bionluk and Armut — with more on the way.
a.beta: Yes. Every new account starts with 100 free credits — enough to adapt all five platforms, build a portfolio and match several jobs.

finalCta.title: Take your freelance career to the next level.
finalCta.subtitle: Free during beta. No credit card required.

mockup.scoreNote: Strong profile. Headline optimization is the biggest opportunity.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account with your email and password.
login.magicLinkPrompt: Used to sign in with an email link before?

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Create your free account and get started right away.
signup.errorNoSession: Account created but the session couldn't be started. Try signing in.

forgot.sentBody: We sent a password reset link to {email}.
forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll send a reset link to your email.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
reset.done: Your password has been updated. Redirecting…

shared.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

layout.feature1: Enter your profile once, adapt it for multiple platforms
layout.feature2: Create a professional portfolio with AI
layout.feature3: See your perfect fit to job listings instantly
layout.feature4: Track all your applications from a single panel
layout.mobileTaglineSub: Manage your freelance career from one place.

shell.comingSoonBody: Stripe integration is on the way.

overview.welcomeSub: Let's set up your freelance profile in 3 steps.
overview.step1Desc: Enter your headline, summary and skills.
overview.title: Overview
overview.noJobsHint: You can start with Add Job.
overview.profileIncompleteDesc: Add your headline, summary and skills to start adapting to platforms.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.sentBody: A verification link has been sent to {email}. Check your inbox.
verifyEmail.description: Verify your email address to secure your account.

jobs.emptyHint: Start with "Add Job"; match with AI and track your applications.

add.title: Add Job
add.matchError: Job added, but AI matching failed. You can match it manually from the job.

analytics.noUsageHint: It will appear here as you adapt, generate portfolios or match listings.

profile.coreProfileDescription: This information forms the foundation for all platforms and your portfolio.
profile.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Senior Frontend Developer · React & TypeScript
profile.summaryPlaceholder: Briefly describe your experience, expertise, and standout results.

adapt.saveProfileFirst: Save your profile first to adapt it.
adapt.emptyState: Optimized text for {platform} will appear here.

platforms.hubSubtitle: Manage each platform's profile, connection, matched jobs and proposals in one place.

card.jobsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No matched jobs} one {# matched job} other {# matched jobs}}
card.saveProfileFirst: Save your profile first to adapt it and match jobs.

detail.profileHint: AI-optimized profile copy for this platform.
detail.noJobs: No jobs for this platform yet. Add one from the Jobs page.
detail.noProposals: No proposals for this platform yet.

linkedin: Lead your headline with your role and a clear value proposition.
Write the About section in first person; back claims with concrete results.
Use industry keywords naturally so recruiters find you.
upwork: Open with the client's problem, then how you solve it.
Keep it scannable — short paragraphs and clear outcomes.
Name your specialty precisely (e.g. 'React & Next.js Frontend Developer').
fiverr: Frame your profile around a productized, repeatable service.
Highlight fast delivery and a clear scope of what's included.
Use benefit-driven language buyers can grasp in seconds.
bionluk: A personalized proposal beats a generic gig — address the specific need.
Write in fluent Turkish with a friendly, trustworthy tone.
Show local references and quick communication.
armut: Respond fast and be specific about how you'll do the work.
State pricing and scope clearly to build trust up front.
Emphasize reliability and past customer satisfaction.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Site
portfolio.description: Create a public page from your profile and share it.
portfolio.saveProfileFirst: Save your profile first to create a portfolio.

accounts.title: My Platform Accounts
accounts.description: Enter your profile URL for each platform. In the future you'll be able to import your profile through these connections.

pricingPage.metaDescription: Credit-based, pay-as-you-go pricing for Multifolio. No subscription. See exactly what each AI action costs.
pricingPage.heroSubtitle: Buy credits once, spend them on any AI action across all five platforms. No subscription, no expiry.
pricingPage.costsSubtitle: Transparent pricing per AI action — you always see your balance before you spend.
pricingPage.actionsNote: Example: 500 credits = 500 adaptations, or 250 proposals, or ~166 full portfolios.
pricingPage.ctaSubtitle: Every new account gets 100 credits — enough to adapt all five platforms and match your first jobs.

feed.feedEmptyTitle: No jobs match your feeds yet
feed.feedEmptyHint: Create a feed with keywords and budget to start seeing matched jobs.
feed.noFeedsHint: Save a search (keywords, budget, platform) and matching jobs show up here.
